---
title: "Welcome!"
---

My name is Adrian. This site brings together two parts of my creative work: photography and drawings.

Want a bit more context about me? [Read the About Me page](about.html).

---

```{=html}
<div class="medium-grid">
  <a class="medium-card" href="photography.html" aria-label="Open the Photography section">
    <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/blogs_josa/creative/photos/animals/thumbnail/IMG_1786.jpg" alt="Photography section preview" loading="lazy">
    <div class="medium-card__body">
      <div class="medium-card__title">Photography</div>
      <p class="medium-card__copy">Landscapes, animals, city scenes, and experiments with the camera.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="medium-card" href="drawings.html" aria-label="Open the Drawings section">
    <img src="https://storage.googleapis.com/blogs_josa/creative/drawings/graphite/thumbnail/2022-05-28_100344.jpg" alt="Drawings section preview" loading="lazy">
    <div class="medium-card__body">
      <div class="medium-card__title">Drawings</div>
      <p class="medium-card__copy">Graphite sketches, watercolour work, and other drawing-based studies.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>
```
